sellingPoints: Blazing fast water fun for pools and lakes
Perfect summer toy and pool party hit

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Make waves with the Hurricane! This high-speed RC boat delivers thrilling aquatic action with its powerful motor, self-righting capsize recovery, and impressive 150-meter range. Perfect for pools, lakes, and calm seas.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 用飓风号掀起巨浪！这款高速遥控船凭借强劲电机、自动扶正翻覆恢复功能和令人印象深刻的150米控制范围，带来刺激的水上行动。非常适合游泳池、湖泊和平静海域。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Rule the Water – RC Speed Boat Hurricane
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 称霸水面——飓风号高速遥控船
marketingCopy.bodyEn: The Hurricane is engineered for pure aquatic excitement. Its streamlined fiberglass hull cuts through water at speeds up to 25 km/h, while the innovative self-righting system ensures that even if you flip it, the fun continues. With a 150-meter range and low-battery alarm, you can race with confidence knowing your boat is always under control.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 飓风号专为纯粹的水上兴奋而设计。其流线型玻璃纤维船身以高达25公里的时速破水前行，而创新的自动扶正系统确保即使翻船，乐趣也能继续。150米的控制范围和低电量警报让您可以自信地竞速，知道您的船只始终在掌控之中。
